# Interface: DockerSpecConfig

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/builder.ts:40](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/builder.ts#L40)

Configuration for the docker-aware cli mode. When set on
[SpecificationConfig](SpecificationConfig.md), the cli runner generates a test-run id, injects
it into the child env under `envVar`, then queries Docker for every
container carrying `testRunLabel=<id>` after the command exits.

```ts
envVar: string;
```
